name: Baked Macaroni and Cheese with Ham Cubes
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups white sauce, prepared as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the dry mustard into the white sauce; add 1 3/4 cups grated cheese and stir until melted (reserve 1/4 cup cheese for topping).
2. Cook the elbow macaroni for six minutes; drain.
3. Add the cheese sauce to the macaroni; stir in the ham cubes.
4. Transfer the mixture into a greased, 2-quart casserole dish; top with the reserved grated cheese.
5. To freeze: cover the casserole with aluminum foil; seal the dish in a jumbo freezer bag.
6. To prepare: place the frozen casserole (covered with aluminum foil) in a preheated 375-degree oven. Bake for 25 minutes. Remove the aluminum foil and bake an additional 25 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
